hero.headline: Master IELTS
hero.subtitle: Achieve your target band score with personalised AI feedback, adaptive mock tests, and intelligent study plans built around your goals.

features.sectionSubtitle: Comprehensive AI-powered tools designed to maximise your IELTS band score.
features.writingDesc: Get detailed, criterion-based feedback on Task 1 and Task 2 — covering task achievement, coherence, vocabulary, and grammar.
features.speakingDesc: Record your responses and receive instant AI analysis of fluency, pronunciation, and lexical resource.
features.mockTestsDesc: Take realistic, timed IELTS mock tests and receive comprehensive band scores across all four skills.
features.studyPlanDesc: AI creates a personalised week-by-week plan based on your level, target score, and available time.
features.trackingDesc: Visualise your progress over time with detailed analytics across all four IELTS skills.
features.recommendationsDesc: Daily practice suggestions that target your weakest areas and accelerate improvement.

howItWorks.sectionTitle: From Where You Are to Where You Want to Be
howItWorks.sectionSubtitle: A clear three-step path to your target band score.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Start with a free assessment. We identify your current skill levels and weak points across all four IELTS sections.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Based on your results and target band, our AI creates a personalised week-by-week plan tailored to your schedule.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Complete daily tasks, take full mock tests, get AI feedback, and watch your band score rise each week.

dashboardPreview.sectionSubtitle: A clear view of your scores, progress, and what to do next.

pricing.sectionSubtitle: Start free and upgrade when you're ready. No hidden fees.
pricing.starterDesc: Begin your IELTS journey at no cost.
pricing.proDesc: For serious learners aiming for Band 7+.
pricing.expertDesc: Maximum support for top band scores.

faq.sectionSubtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.
faq.q1: What is ielts.ai and how does it work?
faq.a1: ielts.ai is an AI-powered IELTS preparation platform that provides personalised feedback on your writing and speaking, generates full mock tests, and creates study plans tailored to your target score and timeline.
faq.q2: How accurate is the AI feedback?
faq.a2: Our AI is trained on thousands of IELTS responses and official marking criteria. It evaluates your work on the same four dimensions as official IELTS examiners: Task Achievement, Coherence & Cohesion, Lexical Resource, and Grammatical Range & Accuracy.
faq.q3: Can I use ielts.ai on my phone?
faq.a3: Yes. Our platform is fully responsive and works on all modern devices — phone, tablet, or computer — so you can practice wherever you are.
faq.q4: How is ielts.ai different from other prep apps?
faq.a4: Unlike generic test prep apps, ielts.ai adapts to your individual performance. Our AI pinpoints your specific weaknesses and creates a dynamic study plan that evolves as you improve — not a one-size-fits-all curriculum.
faq.q5: Do I need an account to start?
faq.a5: You can explore a few sample exercises without an account. To take full mock tests, receive AI feedback, and track progress, a free account is required.
faq.a6: Yes. Our Starter plan is completely free and includes 5 mock tests per month, basic AI writing feedback, and access to all study guides.
faq.q7: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
faq.a7: Absolutely. Cancel anytime from your account settings. Your access continues until the end of the billing period.

footer.tagline: AI-powered IELTS preparation for the modern learner.
